description: 11 - 23-12-2024 - Emails between lan Collard (former Chief Property & Securi Officer, FCDO) and others
text:
Officer, FCDO) and others

Apologies the phone doesn't seem to be working, hopefully this finds you
JCS

oo Forwarded message ---------

From: Ian Collard*< PERSONAL >
Date: Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 13:07

Subject: Re: Urgent vetting question

To. JCS < PERSONAL =
CE JCS < PERSONAL >, Tom Bramley
4 PERSONAL >
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Thanks JCS ,

Ihave since spoken to Tom (this morning) and we will proceed with the clearance process.
JCS is in touch with the individual. We are grateful to GSG and UKSV for expediting
the application once the paperwork comes in.

Best wishes,

Tan

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH

Mobile/WhatsApp: PERSONAL

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

30

From: 
 <
> 
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 11:37:02 AM 
To: Ian Collard * <
> 
Subject: Re: Fw: Urgent vetting question  
Ian 
Thanks for sharing, I was aware of this matter and have been in email contact with 
 
 this morning. I take it from your note that you are seeking confirmation as to the 
need for a DV, however, I understand that 
 has set Lord Mandelson up on the 
system. If it is required then, once the application is completed and arrives with UKSV we 
can progress. We have allocated a vetting officer who is ready to conduct the interview and 
the case is flagged to be locked down to our Special Handling team to limit access. 
I am working over the festive break and will be available as required to update you on 
progress. 
many thanks 
 
On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 11:14, Ian Collard * <
> wrote: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE 
Per Michael's OOO message. 
Ian Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer 
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office 
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH 
Mobile/WhatsApp: 
 
PERSONAL
PERSONAL

JCS
JCS
JCS

31


OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE 
From: Ian Collard * 
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 11:12:51 AM 
To: 
 <
> 
Cc: Michael Roberts <
>; 
<
>; Vita Maynard <
> 
Subject: Urgent vetting question 
Michael, Vincent's team, 
Gerard McGurk was in touch last week about the expected (now confirmed) appointment 
of Lord Peter Mandelson as the next UK Ambassador to Washington.
The specific question was whether Lord M is exempt from a UKV process (specifically for 
DV clearance) as a member of the House of Lords? 
We think CO say he is exempt.  But we want to double check given the policy around 
public appointments, and whether that alters the calculation? 
He plans to begin duties (though not his posting) in early Jan, so time is of the essence.
Best wishes, 
Ian 
Ian Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office 
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH 
Mobile/WhatsApp: 
PERSONAL
PERSONAL
PERSONAL
PERSONAL
PERSONAL
PERSONAL
JCS
32


Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign,
Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation

Jcs
Head of Partner Services
UKSV, Government Security Group
Cabinet Office
E PERSONAL
M: PERSONAL

NSV Privacy Notice
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
